name: Device Stopped Sending Events (Live Machines)
notes: A device that was sending events stopped sending events for over 10 minutes
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match in 10 minutes after BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch
BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match with the same Log Source
conditions_text: when none of BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match in 10 minutes after BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match with the same Log Source
TD_list: APPLY Device Stopped Sending Events (Live Machines) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when none of BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match in 10 minutes after BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN match with the same Log Source
RED_list: Event name: Log Source Stopped Sending Events (Firewall/IPS/VPN/Switch)
Event description: A device (Firewall, IPS, VPN or Switch) that was sending events stopped sending events for over 30 minutes. Please check the device to be sure it has not failed.
